body_transformation: The rounded plump body now features molten gold skin with subtle magma-cracked textures along the limbs and torso, maintaining the original silhouette. Its large round eyes retain their black pupils but glow with a deep crimson ember light, while the smiling mouth remains intact but now shows faint heat-haze distortion around the edges. The short stubby legs are encased in cracked obsidian armor plating that emits a faint amber glow at the joints. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage with molten gold streaks and ember sparks trailing from its base.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with ember sparks and heat-haze distortion.
